text: No person shall drive a vehicle on a public highway while drawing a house coach trailer occupied by any person and no person shall occupy a house coach trailer while it is being drawn upon a public highway.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 7
#### Article 33. Misc. Rules
##### § 1228 — Riding in house coach trailers

No person shall drive a vehicle on a public highway while drawing a house coach trailer occupied by any person and no person shall occupy a house coach trailer while it is being drawn upon a public highway.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: No person shall drive a vehicle on a public highway while drawing a house coach trailer occupied by any person and no person shall occupy a house coach trailer while it is being drawn upon a public highway.
